FR-001.title: extension.activated carries a boolean companionInstalled dimension
tests: src/core/__tests__/telemetry.test.ts::emits companionInstalled through the reporter on extension.activated

FR-002.title: companion.installPrompt action=shown emitted with surface when banner becomes visible
tests: src/core/__tests__/telemetry.test.ts::emits action=shown with the surface the first time a surface is shown

FR-003.title: shown event deduped once per surface per session
tests: src/core/__tests__/telemetry.test.ts::dedupes a repeated shown for the same surface within a session

FR-004.title: companion.installPrompt action=clicked emitted with surface on Install click
tests: src/core/__tests__/telemetry.test.ts::emits action=clicked with the originating surface (not deduped)

FR-005.title: new telemetry fields are booleans/enums only, no identifiers/paths
tests: src/core/__tests__/telemetry.test.ts::carries only the action + surface enum fields — no identifier or path

FR-006.title: new events respect the existing telemetry opt-in gates

FR-007.title: existing usage events remain emitted for used-vs-installed

FR-008.title: telemetry docs list new signals + AppEvents sample query

context: constraint: booleans/enums only, no identifiers/paths; respect existing telemetry gate
intent: Measure companion spec-kit install rate and install-banner prompt→install conversion via opt-in, privacy-scrubbed telemetry
expectations: No new usage event for used-vs-installed — reuse existing spec/phase/workflow events
No identifiers, paths, or free text in any new telemetry field
approach: Add companionInstalled boolean to extension.activated; new companion.installPrompt event with action(shown|clicked)+surface(createSpec|activity); emit helpers + session dedupe live in telemetry.ts; shown from render sites, clicked from banner message handlers only.

decisions.decision: single companion.installPrompt event with action dimension
decisions.why: conversion is one aggregation, no join; enum stays in privacy allow-list

decisions.decision: emit shown from server render sites, deduped per session via module Set
decisions.why: banner is server-rendered and regenerates on every refresh; render decision is the only reliable signal
decisions.rejected: client DOM-mount emit needing new postMessage plumbing

decisions.decision: emit clicked from banner message handlers, not shared install command
decisions.why: install command is also fired by sidebar/upgrade menu; banner handlers isolate prompt conversion

decisions.decision: extract buildActivatedProperties pure helper in telemetry.ts
decisions.why: fireActivatedEvent is private with no harness; a pure assembler makes companionInstalled emit-provable in the reporter-mock test
decisions.rejected: a bespoke extension.ts activation test harness

plan.summary: Telemetry plan: one boolean on activation + one two-dimension installPrompt event, all allow-listed enums
plan.key_finding: clicked must be scoped to the banner handlers, not the shared install command, or the conversion denominator inflates

tasks.summary: 9 tasks across setup(0)/foundational(1)/US1(1)/US2(2)/US3(1 verify)/polish(4); waves parallelize spec-editor+spec-viewer and docs+tests

implement.summary: Shipped install-rate (companionInstalled on extension.activated) + banner conversion (companion.installPrompt shown/clicked × surface) telemetry, privacy-scrubbed, with emit-proof tests

T001.did: Added InstallPromptSurface/Action types, companion.installPrompt event const, session-dedupe Set, reportInstallPromptShown/Clicked + test reset helper

T002.did: extension.activated now reports companionInstalled boolean via isCompanionInstalled(root), false when no workspace root

T003.did: Create-Spec panel emits reportInstallPromptShown('createSpec') when banner visible and reportInstallPromptClicked('createSpec') on the banner Install message

T004.did: Activity/viewer panel emits reportInstallPromptShown('activity') in computeShowInstallPrompt and reportInstallPromptClicked('activity') in the banner Install handler

T005.did: Confirmed spec.created/spec.completed/phase.dispatched/workflow.selected still emit; used-vs-installed computable, no new event needed

T006.did: Added emit-proof tests: extension.activated carries boolean companionInstalled (via reporter mock); companion.installPrompt shown+dedupe, clicked, enum-only fields, disabled-gate suppression

T007.did: README Telemetry section: added companionInstalled + install-prompt shown/clicked signals and an AppEvents sample query (install rate + banner conversion)

T008.did: CHANGELOG [Unreleased] Added entry for install-rate + banner-conversion telemetry (user-facing, no internal symbol names)

T009.did: npm run compile clean; npm test green (125 suites / 1768 tests)

verified.result: companionInstalled emitted via reporter mock; installPrompt shown(deduped)/clicked verified enum-only + gated

last_action: all 9 tasks done — compile clean, 1768 tests pass
